mano_cua.result_summary: 部署环境不兼容导致无法测试。node-sass v4.14.1 不支持 Apple Silicon (arm64) + Node 23，所有 SCSS 文件编译失败，Webpack 构建失败，React 未挂载（#rsg-root 为空）。页面完全白屏，无任何组件渲染。非目标 bug，是环境兼容性问题。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: node-sass v4.14.1 incompatible with Apple Silicon arm64 + Node 23. All SCSS compilation failed. Webpack build failed. React app not mounted - #rsg-root empty. Page completely blank. Environment compatibility issue, not target bug.
